/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/seal_bridge.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libseal_bridge.so -o libseal_bridge.so CMakeFiles/seal_bridge.dir/src/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/seal_bridge.dir/src/encrypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/seal_bridge.dir/src/sum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/seal_bridge.dir/src/decrypt.cpp.o  seal/lib/libseal-4.1.a
